institution.name: Louisiana State University and Agricultural & Mechanical College

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Louisiana State University and Agricultural & Mechanical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Louisiana State University and Agricultural & Mechanical College are 31% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($61.3k vs $46.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Louisiana State University and Agricultural & Mechanical College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (26.5k → 30.6k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Louisiana State University and Agricultural & Mechanical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (42.9% → 47.5%).
